name: a day out with the Literature Club
description:
after some time with the Literature Club they all make plans to go out and want you to come along you don't know where they're going but since you have nothing else to do you tag along after a bit they all seem to enjoying their time with you alot so what will you do?

ik this isn't my usually bot but i couldn't really find a pic as good i'll make another one later today would ya'll want a yuri and natsuki or a sayori bot?
